_meta.haircut_rationale: FHR USD credit converts at folio FX which often clips 3-6% vs market mid. Higher-volatility currencies (TRY, BRL) eat more. Currencies pegged or tightly managed (AED, HKD) eat less.

perk_application_notes.fb_credit_usd_property: Most FHR properties post $100 F&B credit per stay; some post per night — verify on rate detail.
perk_application_notes.daily_breakfast_2pax_usd: Two-person continental or buffet, typical $30/pax/day at luxury properties.
perk_application_notes.late_checkout_4pm_usd: Subject to availability — never guaranteed unless rate fine print says so.
perk_application_notes.room_upgrade_usd_uncertain: Upgrade is subject-to-availability; the $50 default is a conservative expected value, not a guaranteed dollar figure.
perk_application_notes.guaranteed_4pm_usd: Some FHR rates explicitly guarantee 4pm late checkout — that's worth more than the subject-to-availability version.
perk_application_notes.welcome_amenity_usd: Variable: fruit plate, wine, spa credit. Conservative floor.
perk_application_notes.complimentary_wifi_usd: Many FHR-eligible properties already include wifi; only count this where the cash rate does not.
